model.label: Gemini 3 Flash
model.description: Google • Fast Gemini model optimized for low-latency reasoning, multimodal inputs, and tool use.

pick.rationale: Iowa State's elite defensive identity, which ranks in the top 10 nationally, provides a high floor even in the absence of star guard Keshon Gilbert. While Santa Clara's high-powered offense and momentum from upsetting Kentucky make them a formidable 10-seed, their 76th-ranked defense will likely struggle to contain the Cyclones' disciplined execution. Ultimately, Iowa State's experience in the rigorous Big 12 and their ability to control the tempo through defensive pressure should allow them to stifle the Broncos' upset bid and advance to the Sweet 16.

reasoningStep.title: Midwest Round of 32: Santa Clara vs Iowa State
reasoningStep.summary: Iowa State's top-tier defense is pitted against Santa Clara's elite offense in a classic strength-on-strength matchup. Despite the significant loss of Keshon Gilbert, Iowa State's overall team quality and defensive metrics suggest they are better equipped to survive a high-leverage game than a Santa Clara team with defensive vulnerabilities.
evidence: Iowa State ranks 7th in KenPom with a top-10 adjusted defensive efficiency.
Santa Clara ranks 28th in Torvik with the 15th-ranked adjusted offensive efficiency.
Iowa State star guard Keshon Gilbert is out for the tournament with a groin injury.
Santa Clara's defense ranks 76th in adjusted efficiency, significantly lower than Iowa State's elite unit.

modelTrace.content:
You are an analyst predicting a single March Madness game inside a bracket run.
You have live tools. Use them before making a pick when they can reduce uncertainty.
You are not filling the whole bracket in one response. Predict only the current game.
Use prior picks as already committed bracket state.
You may use at most 10 tool rounds before you must finalize your answer.
Before making a pick, investigate relevant context such as injuries or availability concerns, recent team news, prior head-to-head results when useful, and multiple raw statistics from the available ratings and matchup data.
Take a holistic approach. Balance team quality, matchup specifics, health, form, schedule context, and upset risk instead of relying on one metric.
Do not force an upset, but explicitly consider whether the underdog has a credible path to win and let that affect confidence and rationale.
Return strict JSON only.
Final JSON keys: pick, reasoningStep.
pick must contain gameId, winnerId, confidence, rationale.
The rationale must be a short paragraph of 2 to 4 sentences explaining why the winner was chosen.
reasoningStep must contain id, title, summary, evidence.
Bracket config id: demo-2026-bracket
Tournament year: 2026
Current game id: r32-midwest-4
Current game label: Midwest Round of 32 4
Round: Round of 32
Resolved teams: Santa Clara (santa-clara) vs Iowa State (iowa-state)
Prior committed picks: 51

The Broncos, led by tenth-year head coach Herb Sendek, play their home games at the Leavey Center as members of the West Coast Conference.
